content: We can reframe intrinsic curiosity rewards from ICM/RND curious agents as a numerical planning operator that scores the expected information gain of candidate action sequences, turning curiosity from a reward bonus into a core pruning heuristic for hierarchical hybrid planning. This lets numerical planning operators automatically prioritize high-uncertainty, high-learning branches of a plan without pre-specified task reward shaping.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
